description: A plain candid photograph (1008x756) documenting a CBP narcotics seizure. The image shows the open tailgate/bed of a pickup truck (white tailgate, red taillight visible at left, with a trailer hitch and tools in the truck bed) on which roughly nine to ten rectangular brick-shaped bundles wrapped in black plastic/tape are stacked — the typical packaging of smuggled drugs (the tweet identifies methamphetamine and cocaine seized at El Paso ports of entry). The setting appears to be a concrete inspection-area floor with a wall and equipment in the background; harsh daylight. There is no graphic-design overlay, text, headline, or agency seal applied to the picture; it is a routine, undesigned enforcement/evidence photo. The propaganda framing (interdiction success) is supplied entirely by the tweet text, not the image.
